## Type of Change

## Checklist

- [ ] Passes CI (`npm run ci` locally, or all GitHub Actions checks green)
- [ ] Documentation updated if behavior changed
- [ ] No secrets, OCIDs, or internal URLs in the diff
- [ ] Signed-off-by line present in commits (required for OCA): `git commit --signoff`
- [ ] Frontend tests added/updated for changed components
- [ ] Backend tests added/updated for changed routes
- [ ] Docker image builds successfully (`docker build -f appdeploy/Dockerfile .`)
